ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_communication_metrics" (
  "communication_timer" INTEGER /* The timer value for the communication session */,
  "communication_counter" INTEGER /* The counter value for the communication session */,
  "latest_time_of_propagation" INTEGER /* The latest time (in seconds) when the message was propagated */,
  "number_of_nodes_spread" INTEGER /* The number of nodes that have spread the message */,
  "number_of_positive_ack" INTEGER /* The number of positive acknowledgments received */,
  "number_of_negative_ack" INTEGER /* The number of negative acknowledgments received */,
  "number_of_requests" INTEGER /* The total number of requests made during the communication session */,
  "protocol_type" TEXT /* The protocol type used for communication (e.g., TCP, UDP, etc.) */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* The packet loss rate during the communication session */,
  "transmission_delay" REAL /* The average transmission delay during the communication session */,
  "jitter" REAL /* The average jitter during the communication session */,
  "network_topology_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the network_topology table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_timer", "communication_counter")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_topology" (
  "network_topology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the network topology */,
  "topology_name" TEXT /* Name of the network topology */,
  "topology_description" TEXT /* Description of the network topology */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_topology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the communication session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the communication session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the communication session */,
  "total_requests" INTEGER /* Total number of requests made during the session */,
  "total_data_transferred" INTEGER /* Total amount of data transferred during the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_session_metrics" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the communication_sessions table */,
  "communication_timer" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the network_communication_metrics table */,
  "communication_counter" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the network_communication_metrics table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "communication_timer", "communication_counter")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_communication_metrics_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "communication_timer" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the network_communication_metrics table */,
  "communication_counter" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the network_communication_metrics table */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate in the region */,
  "transmission_delay" REAL /* Average transmission delay in the region */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Average jitter in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "communication_timer", "communication_counter")
)
